text:
10/01/2023
944 OPIOID_TKNG_CD OPIOID_TKNG_CD N0415H1 High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Opioid CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking opioid medication during the last seven days or since admission/entry or reentry if less than seven days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
945 OPIOID_INDCTN_CD OPIOID_INDCTN_CD N0415H2 High-Risk Drug (Indication): Opioid CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking opioid medication and whether there is an indication
